requirements.summary: Add Instagram logo that links to the Karma Travels Instagram profile, opening in a new tab when clicked
acceptanceCriteria: Instagram logo is visible on the page
Link opens in a new browser tab
Logo is appropriately sized and positioned for user interaction

file_operations.description: Add Instagram logo icon next to the call button in the header. The logo should be a clickable link that opens https://www.instagram.com/karan.pbx05/ in a new tab (target='_blank' with rel='noopener noreferrer'). Use the generated image asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/instagram-logo.dim_64x64.png. Position the Instagram link appropriately within the existing header layout to maintain the current design and ensure it's visible and accessible on all screen sizes. The logo should match the cool color scheme and integrate seamlessly with the header's styling.
